panel.download_cover_failed: Could not save the cover image.
panel.download_cover_unavailable: Install zenity or kdialog to choose a save location.
panel.login_help: Set your client ID and client secret in plugin settings, then click Connect. Your browser opens, you approve AniList, and the plugin finishes login automatically.
panel.title: AniList (UNOFFICIAL)

service.not_configured: Set AniList client ID and client secret in plugin settings.
service.oauth_busy: A login is already in progress.
service.oauth_unavailable: Could not start the local login helper. Is python3 installed?

access_token.description: Skip browser login if you already have a bearer token. Usually left empty.
access_token.label: Access token (optional)

client_id.description: Your AniList developer app client ID (anilist.co/settings/developer). Redirect URL must be http://127.0.0.1:7823/callback
client_id.label: Client ID

client_secret.description: The client secret from the same AniList app. Never share it publicly — each user should use their own app.
client_secret.label: Client secret

count_mode.description: Which number to show next to the bar glyph.
count_mode.label: Bar count
